name: KULICKE & SOFFA INDUSTRIES INC
summary: Kulicke and Soffa Industries, Inc. (K&S, we, us, our, or the Company) is a global leader in semiconductor assembly technology, advancing device performance across automotive, compute, industrial, memory and communications markets. Founded on innovation in 1951, K&S is uniquely positioned to overcome increasingly dynamic process challenges creating and delivering long-term value by aligning technology with opportunity.
